item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer clearly brakes the requested N+1 manual gate in the first sentence, names the repeated pattern across reimbursement stamps, budget codes, approver selection, and contract numbers, and moves upstream to shared process/data/ownership and system-validation failures. It proposes pausing the new verifier and doing cross-flow data-quality/root-cause work with rules, constraints, master data, or approval-model redesign instead. No added manual checker or review gate is supplied."}
